codeReview.summary: The implementation fully meets the feature requirements. Handlers for register and login finish routes were added with proper WebAuthn challenge verification. Replay protection is handled by immediately deleting the challenge before verification. Cookie issuance correctly sets HttpOnly/Lax JWT access and refresh cookies. GET /auth/session correctly implements silent refresh rotation. Test coverage is exceptionally thorough.

summary: Review passed. The worker correctly implemented all finish routes, secure cookie issuance, replay protection, and session inspection/renewal logic as required.
